title: Near-watchlist cross-border payout
narrative: A dormant wallet reactivates and attempts a first cross-border payout to a beneficiary whose alias closely matches a watchlist entry.
generation_guardrails: Do not hard-code one beneficiary country into the rule suggestion.
Do not use one device model as a risk condition.
Do not generate cases where every signal is extreme.
Keep at least one ambiguous element so the human override remains meaningful.
